title: clinopodium douglasii
intro: Clinopodium douglasii, also known as Purple Sage or Western Clary Sage, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium douglasii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
